title: Orbital Update Report
description: The aggregate data-update report produced by Stream 7's generateUpdateReport() and served at /api/update-report.json. Report-only: it summarizes freshness, source-URL inventory and MVP-readiness across the dataset and never modifies data. This document describes the `report` object inside that endpoint's response.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp the report was generated.

networkChecked.description: Whether source URLs were probed over the network. False for the build-time export.

sourceUrls.description: Source-URL inventory / health summary. URL-health counts are 0 / not-meaningful when networkChecked is false.

readiness.description: MVP-readiness summary (which records meet the curated data standard).

headline.description: High-signal headline counts for quick scanning / dashboards.

brokenOrUnreachableUrls.description: Only meaningful when networkChecked is true; otherwise 0.
